relevance_threshold.description: Minimum score for knowledge injection. Lower = more results (noisier), higher = fewer but more precise.

high_confidence_threshold.description: Score needed to inject 2 results instead of 1.

single_keyword_dampen.description: Multiplier for single-keyword matches to reduce noise from weak signals.

quiet.description: Suppress knowledge injection. Hooks still save session state and memories.

custom_sources.description: Additional documentation URLs to crawl alongside official docs (HTTPS only).

url.description: HTTPS URL of the documentation page to crawl.

label.description: Human-readable label for this source (shown in search results).
